title: roldana aschenborniana
intro: Roldana aschenborniana, also known as Aschenborn's Roldana, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Roldana aschenborniana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Roldana aschenborniana can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for its herbal properties, and its leaves and stems can be used in various herbal preparations.
